globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; connect-src 'self'; font-src 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; frame-src 'none'; img-src 'self' data:; manifest-src 'self'; media-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; worker-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: accelerometer=(), autoplay=(), camera=(), geolocation=(), gyroscope=(), magnetometer=(), microphone=(), payment=(), usb=()
